# Design System Master File — Meridian Open Science

> **LOGIC:** When building a specific page, first check `design-system/pages/[page-name].md`.
> If that file exists, its rules **override** this Master file.
> If not, strictly follow the rules below.

**Project:** Meridian Open Science
**Category:** Academic publishing / Life sciences
**Status:** Generated by `ui-ux-pro-max --design-system`, then **deliberately overridden**.
See [Deviations from the generator](#deviations-from-the-generator) for what changed and why.

---

## Product

An open-access academic publisher (public site) **plus** a journal management system
(submission wizard, peer-review pipeline, editorial dashboard). Reference point:
frontiersin.org — its feature set and information architecture, not its branding.

---

## Global Rules

### Colour palette

| Role | Token | Hex | Notes |
|------|-------|-----|-------|
| Primary / CTA | `brand-700` | `#0F766E` | Trust teal. 5.5:1 on white. |
| Primary hover | `brand-800` | `#115E59` | |
| Tint / selected surface | `brand-50` | `#F0FDFA` | Badges, selected cards |
| Structure & text | `ink-900` | `#0F172A` | Header, footer, body text |
| Muted text | `ink-600` | `#475569` | 7.5:1 on white — never lighter for body copy |
| Small meta text | `ink-500` | `#64748B` | 4.8:1 on white. **On dark backgrounds use `ink-400`.** |
| Accent | `gold-600` / `gold-700` | `#B45309` / `#92400E` | Open-access badges, overdue warnings |
| Page background | white / `ink-50` | `#FFFFFF` / `#F8FAFC` | Alternating bands |

Contrast floor is **4.5:1 for all text**, including placeholders. Photographs always carry a
scrim (`from-ink-950/92`) before text sits on them.

### Typography — "News Editorial"

- **Headings:** Newsreader (serif, designed for long-form) → `font-serif`
- **Body / UI:** Inter → `font-sans`
- Body 16px minimum, line-height 1.6; long-form article text 1.75
- Measure capped at `max-w-prose` (68ch ≈ 65–75 characters)
- `display=swap` on the Google Fonts link — no flash of invisible text

```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Newsreader:opsz,wght@6..72,400;6..72,500;6..72,600;6..72,700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');
```

### Spacing

8px base unit. Section rhythm: `py-20` (80px) between major bands, `gap-5`/`gap-6` in grids.

### Shadows

Depth comes from soft shadows and photography, never decorative gradients.

| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `shadow-card` | Cards at rest |
| `shadow-lift` | Cards on hover, mega-menu, mobile drawer |

### Z-index scale

`dropdown: 10` · `sticky: 20` · `overlay: 30` · `modal: 50`. Never arbitrary values like `z-[9999]`.

---

## Page pattern — Enterprise Gateway (adapted)

Mega-menu navigation, trust signals prominent, path-selection cards. CTA pair:
**Submit research** (primary) + **Log in** (secondary).

Homepage section order:

1. Hero — photo with parallax, mission line, search
2. Stats band — animated counters
3. Author paths — find a journal / find a topic / submit / manage data
4. Featured journals
5. How publishing works — 4-step pipeline
6. Research Topics — open calls for papers
7. Impact — dark band
8. Latest research
9. Newsroom
10. Newsletter + footer

---

## Style — Editorial Grid / Magazine + Swiss rigour

Print-inspired hierarchy, generous whitespace, drop caps and pull quotes on article pages,
a strict grid everywhere else.

---

## Motion (Framer Motion)

All primitives live in `src/lib/motion.ts`.

- Micro-interactions **200ms**; entrances **400–450ms**; custom ease `[0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]`
- Animate `transform` / `opacity` only. The one exception is the dashboard accordion, which
  genuinely needs `height: auto`.
- Hover lifts use `translateY(-4px)` + shadow, **never `scale`** on grid items — scale nudges
  neighbours and reads as layout shift.
- Scroll reveals fire **once** (`viewportOnce`), never on every pass.
- No infinite or decorative animation. Spinners and skeletons only.
- `<MotionConfig reducedMotion="user">` wraps the app; parallax and counters additionally
  check `useReducedMotion()` and snap straight to their end state.

---

## Imagery

Free sources only. Every URL was HTTP-200 verified before use — see `src/lib/images.ts`.

- **Photos:** Unsplash (free licence, commercial use permitted) via `unsplash(id, w, h)`
- **Avatars:** randomuser.me
- **Fallback:** picsum.photos — `<ImageWithFallback>` swaps to it on `onError`, so a dead CDN
  degrades to a placeholder instead of a broken-image icon

Every image sets `width`/`height` (no layout shift), uses `loading="lazy"` below the fold, and
requests `auto=format` for WebP/AVIF.

---

## Icons

**Lucide** only, 24×24 viewBox, sized `w-4`/`w-5`/`w-6`. No emoji as icons, anywhere.

---

## Anti-patterns (do NOT use)

- ❌ Purple/orange "vibrant" palettes — wrong register for scholarly trust
- ❌ Emojis as icons — use Lucide SVG
- ❌ Missing `cursor-pointer` on clickable elements
- ❌ Scale-on-hover in grids — shifts neighbours
- ❌ Text contrast below 4.5:1
- ❌ Instant state changes — always transition (150–300ms)
- ❌ Invisible focus states
- ❌ Charts with no table alternative
- ❌ Colour as the only carrier of meaning (errors, statuses)

---

## Deviations from the generator

The `--design-system` run returned **"Vibrant & Block-based"** with a purple `#7C3AED` primary,
an orange `#F97316` CTA, and **Exo + Roboto Mono** typography. All three were rejected:

1. **Palette.** Purple/orange is tuned for startups and consumer apps — the generator's own note
   reads *"Excitement purple + action orange"*. An academic publisher sells credibility, not
   energy. Replaced with the trust-teal + authority-navy pairing that the `color` domain returns
   for professional/B2B products.
2. **Style.** "Vibrant & Block-based" is listed as *Best For: startups, gaming, youth-focused*.
   Swapped for **Editorial Grid / Magazine**, which the `style` domain lists as *Best For:
   publishing, long-form articles, journalism* — and which rates WCAG AAA.
3. **Typography.** Roboto Mono is unreadable as a body face at article length. Swapped for the
   **News Editorial** pairing (Newsreader headings), with Inter as the body/UI face in place of
   Roboto, because this is a UI-heavy management system as well as a reading surface.

**Kept from the generator:** the Enterprise Gateway pattern (mega-menu, trust signals, path
selection), the 200–300ms interaction timing, and the pre-delivery checklist below.

---

## Pre-Delivery Checklist

- [x] No emojis used as icons (Lucide SVG throughout)
- [x] All icons from one set, consistent sizing
- [x] `cursor-pointer` on all clickable elements
- [x] Hover states with smooth transitions (200ms)
- [x] Text contrast 4.5:1 minimum, verified including placeholders and footer legal text
- [x] Focus states visible for keyboard navigation (`:focus-visible` ring, global)
- [x] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected (`MotionConfig` + CSS + `useReducedMotion`)
- [x] Responsive: 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px
- [x] No content hidden behind the sticky navbar
- [x] No horizontal scroll on mobile
- [x] Charts carry a table alternative
